sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🧱 卷一 · 隐.message: The pre-LLM, discriminative-era privacy foundation. Where membership inference attacks come from, and what differential privacy / federated learning / homomorphic encryption / secure multi-party computation / trusted execution environments each do and don't protect — only the minimum load-bearing set later volumes depend on, not a PPML textbook.
sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🧱 卷一 · 隐.description: The generated-index page description for category '🧱 卷一 · 隐私根基' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

The generated-index page title for category '🧠 卷二 · 记忆与抽取' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🧠 卷二 · 记.message: The flagship volume: why generative pretrained models memorize training data verbatim, how an outside attacker extracts it, what factors (repetition, scale, context) amplify memorization, and defenses like deduplication / DP pretraining / memorization auditing.
sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🧠 卷二 · 记.description: The generated-index page description for category '🧠 卷二 · 记忆与抽取' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

The generated-index page title for category '💬 卷三 · 对话大模型' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

sidebar.privacySidebar.category.💬 卷三 · 对.message: The privacy surface of the conversational-LLM era: PII regurgitation, context-surface privacy (system prompt / conversation context / tool-result leakage), DP fine-tuning made practical, and how membership inference evolves on LLMs.
sidebar.privacySidebar.category.💬 卷三 · 对.description: The generated-index page description for category '💬 卷三 · 对话大模型' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

The generated-index page title for category '🔗 卷四 · RAG 与 Agent' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🔗 卷四 · R.message: Data boundaries in the retrieval-and-agent era: cross-tenant / cross-user retrieval leakage from vector stores, cross-session memory bleed, tool calls sending private data outward, and data boundaries in multi-agent collaboration.
sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🔗 卷四 · R.description: The generated-index page description for category '🔗 卷四 · RAG 与 Agent' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

The generated-index page title for category '🔬 卷五 · 前沿与落地' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🔬 卷五 · 前.message: The current frontier and its engineering landing, along three lines: private computation and confidential inference (TEE / GPU confidential computing / HE / MPC), verifiable deletion and machine unlearning, and production-grade differential privacy and federated learning deployment.
sidebar.privacySidebar.category.🔬 卷五 · 前.description: The generated-index page description for category '🔬 卷五 · 前沿与落地' in sidebar 'privacySidebar'

sidebar.privacySidebar.category.⚖️ 卷六 ·.message: The compliance index: mapping the GDPR right to be forgotten, EU AI Act training-data transparency, NIST, and OWASP LLM02 to engineering actions. Compliance runs through every volume; this one is the master index, and each technique entry embeds a short compliance-mapping note.
